since_last: 60% of 89 AI names green; AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads +4.55%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 60% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.22% · BTC +2.76% · Gold +0.69% · Nasdaq100 -1.54%. 60% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech is doing the heavy lifting at +4.55%.

cards.headline: AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at +4.55%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -4.50%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MU is the standout at -11.12%
cards.body: Leaders: CRWD +9.58%, APP +8.91%, META +8.75%, AVAV +7.99%, PLTR +7.41%. Laggards: MU -11.12%, KLAC -10.97%, TER -10.71%, MRVL -8.88%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -7.47% at $158.1
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -7.47% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
